title: LogiTrack
summary: Route optimization system for last-mile logistics teams.
overview: LogiTrack optimizes last-mile routes and dispatch decisions with live traffic and capacity constraints.
challenges: Dispatchers manually planned routes with outdated spreadsheets.
Delivery SLAs were missed during peak seasonal volume.
Drivers received conflicting instructions across channels.
solution: Dispatch console with route optimization, driver mobile updates, and SLA monitoring for regional carriers.
architectureNote: Python optimization workers on GCP with real-time event streams and a Vue operations dashboard.
